sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The last UP was stopped early due to "noop_short_circuit" - the 6th UP had no gameplay impact. The snake is now adjacent to the box. Let me check the current state and try pressing SPACE when adjacent to the box.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("All nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ('w', 'P'):
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check adjacency
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
print("\nGreen adjacency:")
for a in adj:
    i, j = a
    if nodes[i]['color'] == 'N' or nodes[j]['color'] == 'N':
        other = j if nodes[i]['color'] == 'N' else i
        print(f"  N adjacent to {nodes[other]['color']}({other}) at {nodes[other]['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! The box at rows 36-39, cols 32-35 is now G (dark green) instead of c! So just by moving the snake adjacent to the box, it changed from c to G. The green snake is at rows 41-43, cols 32-35, and the G box is at rows 36-39, cols 32-35. The tail is at row 40, cols 32-35.
So the mechanic seems to be: when the snake moves adjacent to a c box, it turns G. The goal might be to turn all c boxes to G.
Currently:
- Box 1 (top-right): c at rows 24-27, cols 44-47
- Box 2 (middle-left): c at rows 28-31, cols 16-19
- Box 3 (bottom-center): G at rows 36-39, cols 32-35 (already converted!)
I need to convert the other 2 boxes to G. Let me navigate to them. The green is at rows 41-43, cols 32-35. I need to go to the middle-left box at rows 28-31, cols 16-19 first, then the top-right box.
Let me move LEFT and UP to reach the middle-left box.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Box 3 converted to G! Need to convert boxes 1 and 2.
# Green at rows 41-43, cols 32-35
# Box 2 (middle-left): rows 28-31, cols 16-19
# Box 1 (top-right): rows 24-27, cols 44-47

# Move LEFT to reach box 2
# Green right edge is col 35, box 2 right edge is col 19
# Need to move LEFT until green left edge is at col 20 (adjacent to box 2 right edge at col 19)
# Green is 4 cols wide, so when green left col = 20, right col = 23
# But box 2 is at cols 16-19, so green needs to be at cols 20-23 to be adjacent
# Current green cols: 32-35, need to move LEFT 12 cols

# Also need to move UP to align rows
# Box 2 rows: 28-31, green rows: 41-43
# Need green bottom row = 27 (adjacent to box top row 28)
# Green is 3 rows tall, so green top row = 24 when bottom = 27
# Current green top row = 41, need to move UP 17 rows

# Let's move LEFT first, then UP
# But the tail is at row 40, cols 32-35, so we can't move LEFT immediately
# Actually the tail is behind the snake, so moving LEFT should work

action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
